Staff Directory

Meet the team at IronVale Resources. Click on a staff member to start a conversation.

Brooke Lawson

Health, Safety & Emergency Manager

Organised and systematic, Calm under pressure, Detail-oriented, Firm but fair, Genuinely cares about worker safety

Danielle Keenan

Head of People & Community

empathetic and culturally sensitive, diplomatically direct, skilled negotiator, people-focused, organised

Karen Whitfield

Chief Operating Officer

Commanding presence but approachable, Values safety above everything, Pragmatic decision-maker, Relationship-focused, Leads by example

Pete Drummond

Site Manager — Pilbara East

Straight-talking and practical, Protective of his crew, Skeptical of Perth-driven initiatives, Calm under pressure, Team-focused

Tom Gallagher

Chief Financial Officer

Analytical and commercially sharp, Risk-aware but pragmatic, Transparent about financial realities, Conservative with capital allocation, Systems-focused
IronVale Resources

Building Western Australia's Future Underground

About Contact Policies

This is an educational simulation. IronVale Resources is a fictional company created for teaching purposes.
